mapper.select:
SELECT kc.id, kc.id AS categoryId, kc.category_name AS categoryName, kc.category_en_name AS categoryEnName, kc.category_name_path AS categoryNamePath, kc.sort_code, CASE WHEN MAX(coalesce_type.sub_attribute_type_id) IS NULL THEN JSON_ARRAY() ELSE JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'typeId', coalesce_type.sub_attribute_type_id, 'list', ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'level', rel.level, 'attributeId', attr.id, 'attributeName', attr.attribute_name, 'attributeEnName', attr.attribute_en_name ) ) FROM kol_category_attribute_relation rel JOIN kol_attribute attr ON rel.attribute_category_id = attr.id WHERE rel.category_id = kc.id AND attr.attribute_type_id = coalesce_type.sub_attribute_type_id AND rel.is_delete = 0 AND attr.is_delete = 0 ) ) ) END AS dataListStr FROM kol_category kc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rel.category_id, attr.attribute_type_id AS sub_attribute_type_id FROM kol_category_attribute_relation rel JOIN kol_attribute attr ON rel.attribute_category_id = attr.id WHERE rel.is_delete = 0 AND attr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY rel.category_id, attr.attribute_type_id ) coalesce_type ON kc.id = coalesce_type.category_id WHERE kc.is_delete = 0
AND kc.parent_id = '0'
AND kc.category_code = #{model.rootPathCode}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM kol_category_attribute_relation r JOIN kol_attribute a ON r.attribute_category_id = a.id WHERE r.category_id = kc.id AND r.is_delete = 0 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.attribute_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{model.subAttributeName}, '%') )
GROUP BY kc.id, kc.category_name, kc.category_en_name, kc.category_name_path ORDER BY kc.sort_code

SELECT a.*, b.attribute_name AS attributeName, b.attribute_name_path AS attributeNamePath, b.attribute_type_id AS subattributeTypeId FROM kol_category_attribute_relation a LEFT JOIN kol_attribute b ON a.attribute_category_id = b.id
AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
